description_long: This is a stylized, medieval-inspired cup with a cylindrical wooden body reinforced by two thick, metallic bands adorned with runic engravings. The cup features a prominent, angular handle made of the same metallic material as the bands, attached to the upper half. The rim of the cup is crenellated, resembling the battlements of a castle tower, giving it a unique and robust appearance. Around the base, there is a decorative Celtic knot pattern etched into the wood, adding an ornate touch. The wood is a warm, golden-brown color, while the metal elements are a cool, silvery gray, creating a striking contrast. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding liquids.
description: A medieval-style wooden cup with metallic bands, runic engravings, a crenellated rim, and a decorative Celtic knot pattern at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crenellated rim, runic metallic bands, and the handle on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle fully visible, metallic bands and runes prominent, and the decorative base pattern in clear view.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the handle on the left, runic bands and crenellated rim visible, and the base pattern wrapping around.
description_view_3: Rear view with the handle mostly hidden, runic bands and crenellated rim visible, and the decorative base pattern encircling the bottom.
